title: Kalaanite language
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Kalaanite language''' was the native tongue of the [[Kalaanite]]s, the people of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kalaan/Legends|Kalaan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]''
